tasks.label: Serve Megaeco localhost
tasks.command: if (Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { py -m http.server 8000 } elseif (Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { python -m http.server 8000 } elseif (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { npx --yes http-server -p 8000 . } else { Write-Error 'No Python or Node runtime found'; exit 1 }
